mods.name: Aquafir Creature Variants
mods.author: Aquafir; OpenDereth reviewed port
mods.description: Randomly gives eligible ordinary monsters one or more of 18 configurable, stackable runtime combat variants with bounded mechanics and cleanup-safe temporary effects.
mods.safetyNotice: Safe to disable after stopping and restarting the server. The 50% assignment and stacking defaults are intentionally high for testing.

mods.name: All-Tier Salvage & Loot Luck
mods.author: OpenDereth
mods.description: Lets every equipment-loot tier roll the complete ACE material pool, with optional independent controls for loot quality, generated-loot chances, trophies, and rares.
mods.safetyNotice: Safe to disable after restart, but materials and quality already generated on saved items remain.

mods.name: Unlimited Stat Augmentation Gems
mods.author: OpenDereth
mods.description: Removes the shared usage limit for the six innate-stat augmentation gems while keeping each innate stat capped at 100.
mods.safetyNotice: Turning the mod off restores the normal shared limit after restart, but stat increases already earned remain.

mods.name: Three Imbues
mods.author: OpenDereth
mods.description: Allows eligible items to receive as many as three distinct standard salvage imbues while preserving ACE's normal eligibility, tinkering-limit, skill, success-chance, consumption, and failure rules.
mods.safetyNotice: Back up first. Do not permanently remove this mod while characters own multi-imbued items; secondary effects remain saved but stock ACE does not activate them.

mods.name: Unlimited Skill Specializations
mods.author: OpenDereth
mods.description: Removes ACE's 70-credit total specialization ceiling while preserving normal skill prerequisites and skill-credit costs.
mods.safetyNotice: Turning the mod off restores the stock ceiling after restart, but existing over-cap specializations remain until lowered normally.

mods.name: Expanded Cast on Strike
mods.author: titaniumweiner; OpenDereth port
mods.description: Enables cast-on-strike procs on compatible non-Aetheria equipped items such as custom jewelry, armor, and weapons.
mods.safetyNotice: Safe to disable after restart. Custom items remain, but their non-Aetheria equipped procs stop working.

mods.name: Critical Override
mods.author: aquafir; OpenDereth port
mods.description: Overrides physical and magic critical-hit chances against non-player creatures with two settings.
mods.safetyNotice: Safe to disable after restart. Earlier combat results are not recalculated.

mods.name: Society Tailoring
mods.author: aquafir; OpenDereth port
mods.description: Allows Society armor to be used in tailoring while keeping inventory and retained-item checks.
mods.safetyNotice: Turning it off stops new uses, but completed tailoring changes remain on items.

mods.name: CustomClothingBase
mods.author: OptimShi
mods.description: Loads custom server-side ClothingTable entries from JSON without requiring client DAT updates.
mods.safetyNotice: Do not remove while saved items or world content refer to custom ClothingBase IDs.

mods.name: Hello Command
mods.author: aquafir; OpenDereth port
mods.description: Adds /hello and /bye as a small working example for OpenDereth server-mod authors.
mods.safetyNotice: Safe to disable or remove after restart.
